sections.paragraph:
m. pl.-

(1) inauguration to the sacerdotal office, prop. the delivery of the office (see מִלֵּא No. 1 , ), Lev 8:33 Exo 29:22, 26 Exo 29:26, 27 Exo 29:27, 31 Exo 29:31. Meton. the sacrifice of inauguration (compare חַטָּאת sin, and sacrifice for sin), Lev 7:37 8:28 , 31 .

(2) i.q. מִלֻּאָה Exo 25:7 35:9 .
